title: Verilator outputs unexpected multi-bit value for 1-bit wire in simulation

features.name: bit_slice_from_large_wire_arithmetic
features.description: Code should include a multi-bit bit-slice operation from a wire with significantly larger width (slice width < wire width)

features.name: bitwise_or_mismatched_widths
features.description: Code should include a bitwise OR operation between operands of different widths

features.name: double_negation_on_bitwise_result
features.description: Code should include multiple negation operators applied to a bitwise operation result

features.name: ternary_mismatched_width_branches
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator with a narrow literal and a wide expression result

features.name: narrow_wire_assignment_from_wide_expression
features.description: Code should include a narrow 1-bit wire receiving an assignment from a multi-bit expression result
